title: campylocentrum helorrhizum
intro: Campylocentrum helorrhizum, a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a plant species that belongs to the orchid family. The medicinal properties of Campylocentrum helorrhizum have been studied for their potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Campylocentrum helorrhizum is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are prepared by steeping the plant's roots and leaves in hot water.
